creator: guru@unixarea.de
text: I have built a memstick with 12-CURRENT (r303343) and installed into it the packages pkg, xorg, kde and stellarium (and all its ~800 dependencies) of a ports build of July 16 (r418627), stellarium is 0.14.3 at this level; the memstick works nice on my Dell Latitude E6330 and Acer C720; on the Dell stellarium works fine, on the Acer C720 it crashes with the known simptoms: it starts and when it will bring the GUI to full screen, it crashes.
